CIPHER.353.cipherString: A proper cooldown helps lower your heart rate and keeps your muscles loose for your next match.
CIPHER.353.question: The following quote from social media is about pickleball, and has been encoded as an Aristocrat cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.353.author: Bill Bailey

CIPHER.354.cipherString: When all choices seem wrong, choose restraint.
CIPHER.354.question: The gym's scoreboard glitched during dodgeball to show this Baconian cipher by Matthew Stover. What does it say?
CIPHER.354.author: Matthew Stover

CIPHER.356.cipherString: An unbreakable mask and cunning are the keys for executing a plan flawlessly.
CIPHER.356.question: You receive an anonymous text message containing a coded passage. It's said to be a quote by Imania Margria, encrypted with a Checkerboard with a polybius key of DISGUISING. What does it say?
CIPHER.356.author: Imania Margria

CIPHER.357.cipherString: My mom put me in dance at four, I started writing music at ten, and it has always been a super passion of mine.
CIPHER.357.question: The following quote by the actress Serayah has been encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What was the K1 Keyword used to encode it?

CIPHER.358.cipherString: Belief and knowledge are considered to be two different things. But they are not.
CIPHER.358.question: An explorer's journal mentions a “hidden truth” encoded below. It turns out to be a quote by Stanley Fish, written in a Complete Columnar. The quote has DIFFERENT somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.358.author: Stanley Fish

CIPHER.359.cipherString: Do something every day that scares you, which is why I do what I do. It's just the biggest rush of adrenaline. Face your fear head on.
CIPHER.359.question: You intercepted this transmission from a hot air balloon. Decode the Patristocrat version of Tanit Phoenix's famous words using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains GEST  corresponding to the ciphertext letters HXDE on the second line. What does it say?
CIPHER.359.author: Tanit Phoenix

CIPHER.360.question: Someone has left a coded message on the classroom 3D printer's display. You’re told it's written in a Cryptarithm. What do the values 364 09 90252018 decode to?

CIPHER.361.cipherString: I forgive the betrayals and the lies
CIPHER.361.question: Paulo Coelho has been heard to say the following phrase that has been encoded using the Baconian cipher. You are told that the cipher text CRAZY MUSIC KEEP A CHART decodes to be GIVE. What does it say?
CIPHER.361.author: Paulo Coelho

CIPHER.355.cipherString: Strange game. The only winning move is not to play.
CIPHER.355.question: Your graphing calculator won’t stop displaying this Fractionated Morse puzzle. You are told that the quote has NING in it corresponding to the encoded text B A B B I W, meaning A = ●×●; B = ●×–; I = –●×; W = ×––. What does it say?

CIPHER.362.cipherString: By the unification of architecture, sculpture, and painting, a new plastic reality will be created.
CIPHER.362.question: Found on a microchip inside a disassembled robotics kit: this ominous Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?

CIPHER.363.cipherString: drink in the sunshine; greet your friends with a smile, and put soul into every handclasp
CIPHER.363.question: A mysterious postcard arrives from an unknown sender. It contains a coded quote by Elbert Hubbard, written in a Complete Columnar. The quote has SMILE somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.363.author: Elbert Hubbard

CIPHER.364.cipherString: It's very difficult in the technology space when you have been leapfrogged to prosper again.
CIPHER.364.question: A message by James Chanos encrypted using a K2 alphabet with the Aristocrat Cipher has been received. What was the K2 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.364.author: James Chanos

CIPHER.365.cipherString: For the best return on your money, pour your purse into your head.
CIPHER.365.question: A fragment of text is discovered in a time capsule from the year 1750. It's a quote by Benjamin Franklin encrypted as a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has YOUR in it corresponding to the encoded text F P M I T B, meaning B = ●××; F = –●–; I = ●●–; M = ––×; P = –×–; T = ×●–. What does it say?
CIPHER.365.author: Benjamin Franklin

CIPHER.366.cipherString: In the early days of our Federal Government, skeptics concerning its usefulness were found in high places.
CIPHER.366.question: Decrypt the following cipher text that has been encoded using the Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.366.author: Kirby Page

CIPHER.367.question: Hidden in the source code of a retro video game, this Hill puzzle reveals a quote by Mark Akenside with a keyword of TERN. What does it say?
CIPHER.367.author: Mark Akenside

CIPHER.368.cipherString: Every man is a fool for at least five minutes every day; wisdom consists in not exceeding the limit.
CIPHER.368.question: During a field trip, you notice these strange markings on a metal plaque. They represent a quote by Elbert Hubbard, encoded using an Aristocrat using a K3 alphabet. You are told that the unused ciphertext U corresponds to plaintext Z. What was the K3 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.368.author: Elbert Hubbard

CIPHER.369.cipherString: There is a century-old saying, The dollar votes more times than the man.
CIPHER.369.question: A coded message is discovered inside a fortune cookie. It turns out to be a quote by Michael Parenti, encoded using a Porta using a keyword of ELECTION. What does it say?
CIPHER.369.author: Michael Parenti

CIPHER.370.cipherString: This acquaintance would change my life. I became a friend of hers, of this clever woman gifted with genius.
CIPHER.370.question: You open a forgotten email draft saved in the school's computer system. It holds a quote by Alexej von Jawlensky encoded in an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.370.author: Alexej von Jawlensky

CIPHER.371.cipherString: Any kid will run any errand for you, if you ask at bedtime.
CIPHER.371.question: In your game room, you discover the following symbols in a note hidden on the shelf. It's actually a quote by Red Skelton, encoded with a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.371.author: Red Skelton

CIPHER.372.cipherString: Una vida que nadie recuerda. Tras hacer un pacto con el diablo, una joven entrega su alma a cambio de la inmortalidad.
CIPHER.372.question: The following is from a blurb for a Spanish-language edition of a book by V. E. Schwab. It has been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt with an English keyword. What does it say?
CIPHER.372.author: summary Addie La Rue

CIPHER.373.question: Archaeologists unearthed a stone tablet inscribed with a message. It's a quote encoded as a Cryptarithm. What do the values 0857328 32 45696 decode to?

CIPHER.375.cipherString: It is the child of avarice, the brother of iniquity and the father of mischief.
CIPHER.375.question: This quote by George Washington about a vice has been encoded as a Checkerboard cipher with a polybius key of DETERIORATING. What does it say?
CIPHER.375.author: WASHINGTON

CIPHER.376.cipherString: Me di cuenta de que la lucha era solo el comienzo. No imaginé que podía manejarlo, entonces te pregunté por ayuda.
CIPHER.376.question: This is a quote from the Spanish language edition of one of the later Avatar: The Last Airbender comics, where Zuko is talking with Aang in a tea shop. It has been encoded as a K2 Xenocrypt with an English keyword. What does it say?
CIPHER.376.author: Avatar the last airbender: la promesa parte tres

CIPHER.377.cipherString: Our habits limit what we can see, access, sense, and know.
CIPHER.377.question: You intercepted this transmission from a rogue weather balloon. Decode the Nihilist Substitution version of Michael Puett's famous words with a keyword of OBSERVE and polybius key of SELF-AWARENESS. What does it say?
CIPHER.377.author: Michael Puett

CIPHER.374.cipherString: The printing press was at first mistaken for an engine of immortality by everybody except Shakespeare.
CIPHER.374.question: You stumble across this encoded text on an old floppy disk labeled “Project Discovery.” It's a quote by Marshall McLuhan and has been encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.374.author: Marshall McLuhan

CIPHER.378.cipherString: There was no room in him for curiosity; The capacity for observation had long since starved on the aridness of his soul.
CIPHER.378.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by Tanith Lee, written in a Patristocrat using a K2 alphabet. You are told that the cipher ends with SOUL. What does it say?
CIPHER.378.author: Tanith Lee

CIPHER.379.cipherString: Oxides of manganese were used as brown pigments.
CIPHER.379.question: You receive this puzzling text during a live archaeology broadcast. It contains a quote, encrypted as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of COLORFUL and polybius key of CONCENTRATIONS. What does it say?

CIPHER.380.cipherString: Hawaii was beautiful of course. We played at Turtle Bay, an amazing resort right on the ocean.
CIPHER.380.question: A snippet of an interview with Natalie Gulbis has been encoded as a K2 Aristocrat for you to decode. It contains the name of a state.
CIPHER.380.author: Natalie Gulbis
